title: MOIC Virtual Commercial Registration Initiative Including Retail Sale via Internet
summary: Organises legal and flexible procedures for practising e-commerce by including retail sale via internet within virtual commercial registration, subject to sector requirements and permitted activities.

theme_notes.digital_economy.ecommerce: Allows online retail activity under Bahrain’s virtual commercial registration model.

notes: Related instruments: Related to eCommerce National Strategy and Sijilat commercial registration services
